name: jylhis-reverse-engineering
description: Binary reverse-engineering skill — disassembly, decompilation, dynamic analysis, malware safety, MCP-assisted RE.

interface.shortDescription: Binary RE skill — Ghidra / radare2 / Frida
interface.longDescription: Binary reverse engineering — triage, disassembly and decompilation, ELF/PE/Mach-O internals, static and dynamic analysis with radare2/rizin, Ghidra headless, gdb/pwndbg, Frida and binwalk, CTF crackmes, and malware-analysis safety. Includes AI-assisted RE via MCP servers (GhidraMCP, radare2-mcp, frida-mcp, CutterMCP).
